历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 9530 → 8645 → 7708 → 10929 → 11931. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2023 (competition eased), but after the 2024 new college entrance exam reform in Jilin Province, rankings significantly shifted backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3200 positions over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 11931. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 111, 111, 114, 111, and 113 respectively. The 2026 plan is 115, a slight expansion of about 1.8% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, stabilizing in the 50–60 range in recent years, indicating an upper-middle level 211 university. The steady improvement in level positively affects application enthusiasm. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving school management incidents), but no new negative public opinion emerged in the 2026 cycle. Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no significant popularity impact. No record of admission cutoff breaks. Food Science and Engineering is A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, both at the national top level. Majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, and Bioengineering directly correspond to top disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine were rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in 2024, attracting high-scoring candidates. The number of physics category candidates in the province was approximately 80,421 in 2025, estimated at about 79,936 in 2026 (a decrease of about 0.6%), slightly easing competition. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu (Yangtze River Delta), which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Jilin for science/physics is about 110–115 students, with a stable enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan by about 1.8%, the slight decrease in provincial physics candidates by about 0.6%, the steady improvement in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the sustained high popularity of hot majors, the expansion and reduction in candidates slightly ease competition. However, the rise in university level and the appeal of popular majors keep application enthusiasm high. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 11931. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12127, with a range of 11627–12627.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 12127, range 11627–12627. Candidates near the lower bound of the range (11627) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors (Food Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, etc.). Candidates in the middle of the range (approximately 12127) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors with some sprinting for Tier 1. Candidates near the upper bound of the range (12627) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors. Jiangnan University's Food Science and Engineering is an A+ top discipline, with rising social popularity, and deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1801→1697→1318→1749→1652, showing significant fluctuations overall, reaching the lowest point in 2023 (1318, hardest to enter) before rebounding, fluctuating in the 1650–1750 range in recent two years, with a baseline of about 1652 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 25, 26, 23, 28, 25 respectively, with a plan of 24 in 2026, a slight reduction of 4% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.
3. [School Level] 211, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 52nd in the main ranking of Soft Science, continuously rising in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211, the improvement in level has a positive effect on application enthusiasm.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving school management incidents), but no new negative public opinion emerged in the 2026 cycle; Douyin popularity ranked 71st, evaluated as "average", with no significant popularity impact. No record of cutoff line breaks; Food Science and Engineering A+, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+ are both engineering disciplines, weakly related to liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, etc.), with limited direct driving effect on liberal arts applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Law was "differentiated and wait-and-see", Chinese Language and Literature was "recommended", Accounting was "recommended", Teacher Training/Education was "differentiated and wait-and-see", with overall differentiation in liberal arts major popularity; the number of history category examinees in the province was about 31,071 in 2025, estimated at about 30,932 in 2026 (a decrease of about 0.45%), slightly easing competition; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu (Yangtze River Delta), with strong cross-provincial appeal for Jilin Province examinees; the school's enrollment scale for liberal arts/history category in Jilin Province is about 24–28 students, relatively small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation of historical rankings in the 1650–1750 range in recent two years, a slight reduction of 4% in the 2026 plan, a slight decrease of about 0.45% in provincial history category examinees, steady improvement in school level but weak correlation between liberal arts majors and advantageous disciplines, the reduction in enrollment is the main factor, slightly intensifying competition, but the decrease in examinees has a counterbalancing effect; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 1652; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1574, with a range of 1291–1857.
